name: Lemon Pudding Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 large egg yolks at room temperature
4 tablespoons (113g) Butter, softened to room temperature
2 large egg whites at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, cream the butter well.
2. Add 3/4 cup (90g) sugar in two additions, beating for one minute after each portion is added.
3. Blend in the egg yolks, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Beat in the lemon juice and rind; beat in flour and cream until combined.
5. In a small deep bowl, beat the egg whites to a moderately high speed until frothy.
6. Add the cream of tartar and continue beating until soft peaks form.
7. Gently fold in 1/4 cup (90g) sugar into the egg whites, then add the remaining egg whites using a spatula.
8. Carefully pour the filling into the baked pie shell.
9. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 10 minutes, then reduce the oven temperature to 350°F (175°C).
10. Continue baking for about 25 minutes or until the top is well risen and firm to the touch.
11. Transfer to a cooling rack and cool completely before refrigerating for 6 hours before serving.
This yields one 9-inch pie.
